meta.title: S4x18 ICS Capture The Flag (CTF) Competition
meta.description:
Reid Wightman provided an overview of the ICS CTF and interviewed the winning team from Booz Allen Hamilton. Network diagrams, pictures, examples of the 48 flags, tips for future competitors and more.

At 10:07 the winners discuss some of their favorite flags.
